---
name: agent-observability
description: "Track operational visibility for agentic execution. Use when logging handoffs, step timing, task cost, and rework metrics."
---

# Agent Observability

## What to Track per Task
- Handoff log (from, to, reason, timestamp).
- Time per delivery stage.
- Estimated execution cost.
- Rework by change type.

## Weekly Team Metrics
- Lead time per task.
- First-cycle success rate.
- Percentage requiring correction loops.
- Mobile performance regression rate.

## Output Contract
- Short operational summary.
- Consolidated metrics.
- Alerts and recommended actions.
